description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated figure with intricate detailing, likely representing a deity or important historical figure. The figure is adorned with a headdress and jewelry, and sits cross-legged on a stepped pedestal. The arms are positioned forward, with hands resting on the knees, and the facial features are finely carved, including a serene expression and prominent eyes. The back of the sculpture shows detailed hair or headgear, with vertical ridges and a rounded top. The entire piece has a uniform, stone-like texture and coloration, suggesting it is carved from a single block of material. The base is broad and stable, supporting the upright posture of the figure.
description: A detailed, stone-like sculpture of a seated, adorned figure with a headdress, resting on a stepped pedestal. The figure features intricate carvings and a serene facial expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, headdress, jewelry, and both arms resting forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the layered headdress, and the depth of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the detailed hair or headgear and the stepped base, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the layered structure of the headdress and base.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
